title: Better Optimization
description: Better FPS, TPS, Lower MSPT, Best PvP, Redstone and Command, Better Optimaztion, Higher Preformance
body:
**Maximum Performance: Improve Gaming Experience, Focus on Boosting FPS and Reducing MSPT, Especially When Using 2048X+ Texture Packs**
## Feature
- **Specifically designed for High-Pixel Resolution Packs(512X/1024X/2048X+) With Best FPS/MSPT**
- Only Release Audited & Tested ver using Maximum Performance PC with 512X+ Packs
- Only Open Source Mods
- Released updates only when all mods stable
- Compatible with most Workstations/Datacenter PC (5/10/2026#Tested: RTX PRO 6000)
- Contains mods ID list, Can update manually anytime
- Natively Wayland/Linux Support
### Test
- ROG Strix SCAR 16 (2025) G635 (042W)
- Ultra 9 275HX + RTX 5090 Laptop + 32GB + 1+1TB
- Random Seed Default World
- Default Config, 32 Chunks
- 224/245 FPS, 1.2/50 MSPT

![screenshot of Minecraft's debug menu](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/iBbvhYdC/images/d45a347749288ccfe8da3b0c1e9becf40bca1468.png)
